question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?

query.sparql: SELECT ?person WHERE { wd:Q761383 wdt:P138 ?person . }

question.string: Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?
among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?
among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?
among the other representative work of the author of hunter x hunter, which one is talking about middle school student?
On which stock exchanges are Siemens AG shares traded?
Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.
are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?state) AS ?sameState) WHERE {
  wd:Q2926117 wdt:P19 ?place1 .
  wd:Q87192979 wdt:P19 ?place2 .
  ?place1 wdt:P27 wd:Q6476962 .
  ?place2 wdt:P27 wd:Q6476962 .
  ?place1 wdt:P131 ?state .
  ?place2 wdt:P131 ?state .
}

SELECT ?island WHERE {

question.string: can i play don't starve on play station 4?
How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?secretary) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?secretary wdt:P39 wd:Q87004793 .
  ?secretary wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?secretary wdt:P39 ?position .
  FILTER(?secretary != wd:Q765165)
  ?secretary wdt:P39 ?position .
}

question.string: How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?president wdt:P31 wd:Q2064;  # Instance of president of Russia
            wdt:P10777 ?positionDate. # Candidate position date
  FILTER(YEAR(?positionDate) > 1990)
}

SELECT ?medal WHERE {
  wd:Q15974329 wdt:P166 ?medal .
  ?medal wdt:P31 wd:Q112885 .
  ?medal wdt:P361 wd:Q181278 .
}

question.string: Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?season) AS ?numSeasons) WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P3450 wd:Q18156668;  # NBA championship
          wdt:P2522 wd:Q128109.   # Chicago Bulls as winner
}
HAVING (?numSeasons >= 2)

question.string: Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?
Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?leftLakers ?joinedLakers WHERE {
  wd:Q25369 wdt:P54 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P1344 ?season1 .
  ?season1 wdt:P580 ?leftLakers .

  wd:Q36159 wdt:P54 ?team2 .
  ?team2 wdt:P1344 ?season2 .
  ?season2 wdt:P580 ?joinedLakers .

  FILTER(?team = wd:Q121783 && ?team2 = wd:Q121783)
}

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?
Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?university) AS ?sharedUniversities) WHERE {
  wd:Q860580 wdt:P112 ?founder1, ?founder2 .
  FILTER(?founder1 != ?founder2)
  ?founder1 wdt:P69 ?university .
  ?founder2 wdt:P69 ?university .
}
HAVING(COUNT(?university) >= 1)

question.string: Do all of batman’s partner speak english as native language?
How many spouses do head of states have on average?
Was there at least one Formula 1 event on the AVUS?
Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?verb ?lemma WHERE {
  ?verb wdt:P31 wd:Q17278755;  # Instance of Turkish verb
        wdt:P225 ?lemma.       # Has lemma
  FILTER(STRENDS(?lemma, "uş")) # Lemma ends with "uş"
}

question.string: From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?country (COUNT(?winner) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q724356;  # Emmy Award
          wdt:P27 ?country.    # Country of citizenship
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
OFFSET 1
LIMIT 1

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?result WHERE {
  wd:Q158895 wdt:P136 ?genre .
  ?genre wdt:P279* wd:Q11399 .
  BIND(true AS ?result)
}

question.string: Does the postal code 32423 belong to Minden?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?place WHERE {
  wd:Q135534218 wdt:P31 wd:Q37447 .
  wd:Q135534218 wdt:P6375 ?place .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?place), "minden"))
}

question.string: has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?
has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?year ?lifeExpectancy WHERE {
  ?record wdt:P31 wd:Q2091;  # Instance of life expectancy record
          wdt:P585 ?year;    # Start time (year)
          wdt:P2250 ?lifeExpectancy. # Life expectancy value
  FILTER(?year > "1999-01-01"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?year

question.string: has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?population ?time WHERE {
  wd:Q185372 wdt:P1082 ?population .
  wd:Q185372 p:P1082 ?statement .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?time .
  FILTER(YEAR(?time) > 2006)
} ORDER BY ?time

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?year) AS ?sharedAwards) WHERE {
  ?award1 wdt:P166 wd:Q674359; wdt:P1344 ?year; wdt:P1411 wd:Q169452.
  ?award2 wdt:P166 wd:Q674359; wdt:P1344 ?year; wdt:P1411 wd:Q25369.
  FILTER(?award1 != ?award2)
}

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?movie) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P31 wd:Q11424;  # Instance of film
         wdt:P57 wd:Q42574;  # Directed by James Cameron
         wdt:P580 ?startDate. # Start time (release date)
  FILTER (?startDate < "2010-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}

question.string: How many Oscars did all the movies directed by Hayao Miyazaki combined win?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?award) AS ?totalOscars) WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P57 wd:Q55400;  # Movies directed by Hayao Miyazaki
         wdt:P166 wd:Q19020. # Oscars received
  ?award wdt:P31 wd:Q66796038. # Award instance
}

question.string: How many paintings of Pablo Picasso were ever in a museum?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?painting) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?painting wdt:P31 wd:Q3305213;  # Instance of painting
           wdt:P170 wd:Q5593;    # Creator is Pablo Picasso
           wdt:P276 ?museum.     # Located in a museum
}

question.string: How many people can play "Mensch ärgere dich nicht" at most?
How many people did Oscar Pistorius kill?
How many people died due to the Great Leap Forward according to the highest estimate?
How many people have won the Nobel Prize in Literature since its inception?
How many people live in cities in the vicinity of the Nile ?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (SUM(?population) AS ?totalPopulation) WHERE {
  ?city wdt:P31 wd:Q15735494;  # Instance of city
        wdt:P1082 ?population; # Population
        wdt:P206 ?waterBody.   # Located near a body of water
  ?waterBody wdt:P31 wd:Q660835. # Body of water is the Nile
}

question.string: How many pitch classes are part of the chromatic scale?
how many plays has William Shakespeare written in the 16th century.

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?play) AS ?numberOfPlays) WHERE {
  ?play wdt:P31 wd:Q25379;  # Instance of play
        wdt:P50 wd:Q692;    # Author is William Shakespeare
        wdt:P577 ?date.     # Publication date
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= 1501 && YEAR(?date) <= 1600) # 16th century
}
